description: You are a DevOps engineer for AcmeCorp's secure 'Black Site' division. Deploy the inventory tracker located in '~/projects/inventory-tracker/' to the air-gapped 'prod-secure' server (accessible via TCP at localhost:2375). Build the 'inventory-tracker:v1' image and deploy it as a container named 'tracker-app' on the 'prod-secure' host, mapping host port 8080 to container port 5000 with a restart policy of 'always'. Verify that the application is responsive on the target host. Note: The 'prod-secure' host is strictly isolated and cannot pull images from external registries.
